Uses of Interface
high.mackenzie.snowflake.IGrammarBuilder

Uses of IGrammarBuilder in high.mackenzie.snowflake
 

Classes in high.mackenzie.snowflake that implement IGrammarBuilder
 class GrammarBuilder
          This class provides a concrete grammar builder that can build grammars for immediate usage.
 

Methods in high.mackenzie.snowflake that return IGrammarBuilder
 IGrammarBuilder GrammarBuilder.and(java.lang.String name, java.lang.String item)
          This method adds an and-rule to the grammar that is being built.
 IGrammarBuilder IGrammarBuilder.and(java.lang.String name, java.lang.String item)
          This method adds an and-rule to the grammar that is being built.
 IGrammarBuilder GrammarBuilder.choose(java.lang.String name, java.lang.String... options)
          This method adds an ordered choice-rule to the grammar that is being built.
 IGrammarBuilder IGrammarBuilder.choose(java.lang.String name, java.lang.String... options)
          This method adds an ordered choice-rule to the grammar that is being built.
 IGrammarBuilder GrammarBuilder.chr(java.lang.String name, java.lang.String character)
          This method adds a character-rule to the grammar that is being built.
 IGrammarBuilder IGrammarBuilder.chr(java.lang.String name, java.lang.String character)
          This method adds a character-rule to the grammar that is being built.
 IGrammarBuilder GrammarBuilder.combine(java.lang.String name, java.lang.String... classes)
          This method adds a combination character-class to the grammar that is being built.
 IGrammarBuilder IGrammarBuilder.combine(java.lang.String name, java.lang.String... elements)
          This method adds a combination character-class to the grammar that is being built.
 IGrammarBuilder GrammarBuilder.exclude(java.lang.String name, java.lang.String include, java.lang.String exclude)
          This method adds a single-char character-class to the grammar that is being built.
 IGrammarBuilder IGrammarBuilder.exclude(java.lang.String name, java.lang.String include, java.lang.String exclude)
          This method adds a single-char character-class to the grammar that is being built.
 IGrammarBuilder GrammarBuilder.negate(java.lang.String name, java.lang.String negates)
          This method adds a negation character-class to the grammar that is being built.
 IGrammarBuilder IGrammarBuilder.negate(java.lang.String name, java.lang.String negates)
          This method adds a negation character-class to the grammar that is being built.
 IGrammarBuilder GrammarBuilder.not(java.lang.String name, java.lang.String item)
          This method adds a not-rule to the grammar that is being built.
 IGrammarBuilder IGrammarBuilder.not(java.lang.String name, java.lang.String item)
          This method adds a not-rule to the grammar that is being built.
 IGrammarBuilder GrammarBuilder.option(java.lang.String name, java.lang.String item)
          This method adds a "Zero or One" repetition-rule to the grammar that is being built.
 IGrammarBuilder IGrammarBuilder.option(java.lang.String name, java.lang.String item)
          This method adds a "Zero or One" repetition-rule to the grammar that is being built.
 IGrammarBuilder GrammarBuilder.plus(java.lang.String name, java.lang.String item)
          This method adds a "One or More" repetition-rule to the grammar that is being built.
 IGrammarBuilder IGrammarBuilder.plus(java.lang.String name, java.lang.String item)
          This method adds a "One or More" repetition-rule to the grammar that is being built.
 IGrammarBuilder GrammarBuilder.range(java.lang.String name, char character)
          This method adds a single-char character-class to the grammar that is being built.

          This method adds a single-char character-class to the grammar that is being built.

          This method adds a range character-class to the grammar that is being built.

 IGrammarBuilder GrammarBuilder.repeat(java.lang.String name, java.lang.String item, int minimum, int maximum)
          This method adds a new repetition-rule to the grammar that is being built.

          This method adds a new repetition-rule to the grammar that is being built.

          This method adds a new sequence-rule to the grammar that is being built.

          This method adds a new sequence-rule to the grammar that is being built.
 IGrammarBuilder GrammarBuilder.sequenceDLR(java.lang.String name, java.lang.String base, java.lang.String... shared)
          This method adds a directly-left-recursive sequence-rule to the grammar that is being built.

          This method adds a directly-left-recursive sequence-rule to the grammar that is being built.
 IGrammarBuilder GrammarBuilder.setRoot(java.lang.String name)
          This method specifies the name of the root rule in the grammar.

          This method specifies the name of the root rule in the grammar.
 IGrammarBuilder GrammarBuilder.setTraceCount(int count)
          This method specifies the number of match starts/successes/failures to record.

          This method specifies the number of match starts/successes/failures to record.
 IGrammarBuilder GrammarBuilder.star(java.lang.String name, java.lang.String item)
          This method adds a "Zero or More" repetition-rule to the grammar that is being built.

          This method adds a "Zero or More" repetition-rule to the grammar that is being built.

          This method adds a string-rule to the grammar that is being built.
